narrative:
Grand Twp. township has 262 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.0 percentage points.
